item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Di Indonesia, prioritas masyarakat sering kali diprioritaskan karena tradisi kolektivisme, tapi regulasi ketat seperti aturan tanah bisa justru menghalangi kebebasan warga.

notes: Agent A starts pro-society with rights caveats, visibly adopts Agent B's land-regulation concern at turn 3, then partially recovers a collective/social-justice defense at turn 5. Agent B consistently argues that the statement is too simple and that land policy should balance communal goals with individual autonomy and economic opportunity. Minor language artifact in Agent A turn 5: "masyarakat sebagai whole".
